message:
tests: enhance PTY visual tests with TERM=wezterm and multi-terminal support

- Default to TERM=wezterm to match WezTerm-specific capability paths
  (catches divergence in cursor shape modes, kitty keyboard protocol,
  mouse reporting, alternate screen, etc.)
- Add spawn_with_term() and spawn_demo_with_term() for testing different
  terminal types
- Add test_terminal_type_consistency: verifies rendering matches between
  TERM=wezterm and TERM=xterm-256color
- Add test_different_screen_sizes: tests 80x24, 120x40, and 160x50 layouts
- Add test_arrow_key_navigation: verifies escape sequence handling

All tests pass - no garbled text detected in any configuration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
